headline: Alerus Financial (ALRS) Stock Sees Fair Value Lift As Analysts Weigh Diversified Growth
summary: Alerus Financial’s analyst fair value estimate has been reset from $28.13 to $31.00, putting more focus on how current market pricing lines up with this updated target range in the low $30s. Recent Street commentary links these targets to a mix of optimism around the company’s diversified banking, wealth, and retirement businesses, along with some caution about how that story translates into execution and valuation. Read on to see what is driving this evolving narrative and how you can follow...
